playground.title: Playground
playground.description: Test and experiment with prompts interactively

empty.title: No messages yet
empty.description: Start a conversation to test your prompt.

header.viewAllTracesForExperiment: View all traces for this experiment

runDisabled.selectModel: Please select an LLM model for your prompts
runDisabled.selectModelSingle: Please select an LLM model for this prompt
runDisabled.emptyMessages: Some messages are empty. Please add some text to proceed
runDisabled.mediaNotSupported: Some prompts contain media but the selected model doesn't support media input
runDisabled.datasetRemoved: Your dataset has been removed. Select another one
runDisabled.noPermission: You don't have permission to run prompts

prompt.selectModel: Please select an LLM model for this prompt
prompt.emptyMessage: Message is empty. Please add some text to proceed

leaveExperiment.title: Leave experiment mode?
leaveExperiment.descriptionWithExperiments: You'll return to prompt iteration mode. Your experiment results are saved and can be viewed anytime on the
leaveExperiment.descriptionSimple: You'll return to prompt iteration mode.
leaveExperiment.experimentRunningDescription: Your experiment is currently running. Leaving now will interrupt the execution and may result in incomplete experiment items. Are you sure you want to leave?
leaveExperiment.promptRunningDescription: Your prompt is currently running. Leaving now will interrupt the execution and may result in incomplete traces. Are you sure you want to leave?

resetConfirm.title: Reset playground
resetConfirm.description: Resetting the Playground will discard all unsaved prompts. This action can't be undone. Are you sure you want to continue?

metricSelector.noMetricsAvailableDesc: Create an online evaluation rule for the Playground project to generate metrics for your outputs.
metricSelector.selectTestSuiteFirst: Please select a test suite first

outputs.testSuiteLoadingDesc: Experiments will run, but may not use the full test suite until loading completes.

runExperiment.title: Run experiment
runExperiment.datasetDescription: Run prompts against a dataset. Results will be scored using selected metrics.
runExperiment.testSuiteDescription: Run prompts against a test suite. Results will be scored using the assertions defined on the suite.

navigationBlocker.experimentInProgressDescription: Your experiment is currently running. Leaving now will interrupt the execution and may result in incomplete experiment items. Are you sure you want to leave?
navigationBlocker.promptInProgressDescription: Your prompt is currently running. Leaving now will interrupt the execution and may result in incomplete traces. Are you sure you want to leave?

actionErrors.assertionPollingTimeout: Assertion evaluation polling timed out after 5 minutes
actionErrors.assertionPollingFailed: Failed to poll assertion evaluation status
actionErrors.experimentPollingTimeout: Experiment completion polling timed out after 5 minutes
actionErrors.experimentPollingFailed: Failed to poll experiment completion status
